name: bom-dia-tv
description: App Bom Dia para Android TV

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for pure web'
scripts.android:init: npm install @capacitor/cli @capacitor/core && npx cap init "Bom Dia TV" com.bomdia.tv --web-dir .
scripts.android:add: npm install @capacitor/android && npx cap add android
